summary: Completed testing of new 'Near Me Now' feature on Home page. All tests passed. The feature correctly toggles between active/inactive states, updates the location subtitle, and restores previous filter settings when deactivated.
passed_tests: Near Me Now button (crosshair icon) visible in header next to Favorites/Profile buttons
Near Me Now button initially inactive (small circle with gray bg-muted/40)
Clicking Near Me Now button activates it - button turns green (bg-primary) with 'Near' text
When active, button has animate-pulse-slow animation
When Near Me Now is active, location subtitle shows '500m · Near Me Now' in green text
Clicking Near Me Now again deactivates it - restores previous radius text ('5 km radius')
Other header buttons (Favorites, Profile, Feed/Map toggle) still present and functional
BottomNav shows 4 tabs: Explore, Shuffle, Visit, Weeds (no Plans tab)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user from iteration_7
context_for_next_testing_agent: Near Me Now feature fully tested and working. Test user test@spothunt.com has completed onboarding. The button uses data-testid='near-me-now-btn'. When active: bg-primary class, animate-pulse-slow animation, shows 'Near' text. Location subtitle changes from '5 km radius' to '500m · Near Me Now' when active.

near_me_now_button.location: Home page header, next to Favorites/Profile buttons

inactive_state.appearance: Small circle with gray crosshair icon

active_state.classes: bg-primary text-primary-foreground px-3 shadow-lg shadow-primary/25 animate-pulse-slow
active_state.appearance: Expanded pill with green bg + 'Near' text + pulsing glow animation

near_me_now_button.toggle_behavior: Saves current filters before activating, restores them on deactivation
